arts.ttl: A top-of-the-table clash between Inter and Napoli
arts.sum: Napoli have won just one of their last 10 matches against Inter in Serie A - a 3-1 win, at Maradona, in May 2023, with goals scored by Anguissa, Di Lorenzo and Gaetano - drawing three of those (including the most recent one in March) and losing six in the process. Napoli have lost seven of their last 12 games (W1 D3) played against Inter in Serie A; in the period (since the 2018-19 season), the Nerazzurri are the team against which the Neapolitans have suffered the most defeats in the competition.

arts.ttl: Inzaghi calls for “one of Inter’s best performances” against league leaders Napoli
arts.sum: Inter Milan manager Simone Inzaghi has emphasized the need for a top-level performance from his team as they prepare to face Serie A leaders Napoli on Sunday, November 10th at 20:45. Speaking to the club’s official channels ahead of the crucial match, Inzaghi stated, “Tomorrow we’ll need one of Inter’s best performances. We’re facing the league leaders, and Conte is doing a great job. We have to play a great game in front of our fans.” The Inter boss acknowledged the challenges his team faces, having recently expended significant energy in their midweek Champions League victory. arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Napoli: Match Preview
arts.sum: A highly anticipated showdown is set to unfold this Sunday at the iconic San Siro, where reigning Serie A champions Inter Milan will face off against league leaders Napoli. This clash not only promises to be a thrilling encounter but also carries significant implications for the title race, with both teams vying for supremacy in Italy’s top flight. As the teams prepare to meet, Napoli hold a slender lead over Inter, sitting just one point clear in the standings. arts.ttl: Napoli Handed Decisive Injury Boost Ahead of Inter Showdown
arts.sum: Serie A pacesetters Napoli have received a significant injury boost ahead of Sunday night's mouth-watering league clash against Inter. According to Partenopei boss Antonio Conte via Calciomercato, Stanislav Lobotka is available for selection after missing out on the last two matches due to injury.
